userMessage: Set CH1 200mV DC 50ohm VDD_CORE, CH2 500mV DC 50ohm VDD_IO, CH3 1V DC 50ohm VDD_PHY, CH4 2V DC 1Mohm PGOOD signal. Set trigger on CH4 rising edge 1V normal mode. Single sequence acquisition record length 10 million samples. Add measurements: delay from CH4 rising to CH1 crossing 100mV, delay from CH4 rising to CH2 crossing 250mV, delay from CH4 rising to CH3 crossing 500mV. Add pk2pk and mean on CH1 CH2 CH3. Query all delay and measurement results saving to named variables. Save all 4 channels as binary files. Take screenshot.

response.text:
I can’t safely emit applyable TekAutomate flow JSON for this request.

Missing exact verified SCPI in this turn for:
- CH4 trigger level at 1 V
- Full dual-source delay measurement setup on MSO4/5/6, specifically the exact source/source2 and per-reference-level binding needed to measure CH4 rising to CH1/CH2/CH3 crossings at 100 mV / 250 mV / 500 mV

I do have verified commands for channel scale/coupling/termination/labels, trigger source+slope, normal mode, single-sequence stop-after, record length, generic measurement add/type, generic measurement result queries, and built-in waveform/screenshot steps. But completing the requested flow as-is would require guessing the missing measurement/trigger syntax, so I’m failing closed.
